panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.title: Cost Today

panels.description: Average electric cost per day from published device wattage multiplied by observed on-time across the last 30 completed daily summaries.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_electric)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND cost_total > 0

panels.title: Runtime Electric $/Day (30-Day Avg)

panels.description: Average gas cost per day across the last 30 completed daily summaries.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_gas)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND cost_total > 0

panels.description: Average total cost per day across the last 30 completed daily summaries.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND cost_total > 0

panels.title: Total $/Day (30-Day Average)

panels.description: Daily cost stacked by utility type. Electric uses published device watts multiplied by observed on-time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, cost_electric AS "Runtime Electric"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, cost_gas AS "Gas"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, cost_water AS "Water"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.title: Daily Cost by Type

panels.description: Stacked monthly greenhouse utility cost for the current local month-to-date plus the previous five months. Electric uses published device watts multiplied by observed on-time; gas and water use the public rate assumptions shown on Resource Use.

targets.rawSql:
WITH months AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    (date_trunc('month', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date)::date - interval '5 months')::date,
    date_trunc('month', (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date)::date,
    interval '1 month'
  )::date AS month_start
), costs AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', date)::date AS month_start,
    ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(cost_electric, 0))::numeric, 2) AS electric_cost_usd,
    ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(cost_gas, 0))::numeric, 2) AS gas_cost_usd,
    ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(cost_water, 0))::numeric, 2) AS water_cost_usd
  FROM daily_summary
  WHERE date >= (SELECT min(month_start) FROM months)
    AND date < ((SELECT max(month_start) FROM months) + interval '1 month')::date
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  to_char(m.month_start, 'Mon YYYY') AS "Month",
  COALESCE(c.electric_cost_usd, 0) AS "Runtime Electric ($)",
  COALESCE(c.gas_cost_usd, 0) AS "Gas ($)",
  COALESCE(c.water_cost_usd, 0) AS "Water ($)",
  COALESCE(c.electric_cost_usd, 0)
    + COALESCE(c.gas_cost_usd, 0)
    + COALESCE(c.water_cost_usd, 0) AS "Total ($)"
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN costs c USING (month_start)
ORDER BY m.month_start

panels.title: Monthly Resource Cost by Source (6 Months)

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, ROUND((cost_electric/NULLIF(cost_total,0)*100)::numeric,1) AS "Electric %"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, ROUND((cost_gas/NULLIF(cost_total,0)*100)::numeric,1) AS "Gas %"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, ROUND((cost_water/NULLIF(cost_total,0)*100)::numeric,1) AS "Water %"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.title: Utility Split

panels.description: A simple cost anchor chart for explaining what one hour of action actually costs.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, value FROM (
  SELECT 'Electric heat (1 hr)'::text AS time, 0.167::double precision AS value
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Gas heat (1 hr)', 0.623
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Fog (1 hr)', 0.182
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Lights (1 hr)', 0.161
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Hot day total', 2.52
) s

panels.title: Cost of One Action
Runtime Hours by Equipment

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time,
  COALESCE(runtime_heat1_min,0)/60.0 AS "Heat 1",
  COALESCE(runtime_heat2_min,0)/60.0 AS "Heat 2",
  COALESCE(runtime_fan1_min,0)/60.0 AS "Fan 1",
  COALESCE(runtime_fan2_min,0)/60.0 AS "Fan 2",
  COALESCE(runtime_fog_min,0)/60.0 AS "Fog",
  COALESCE(runtime_vent_min,0)/60.0 AS "Vent",
  COALESCE(runtime_grow_light_min,0)/60.0 AS "Grow Lights",
  COALESCE(runtime_mister_south_h,0) AS "Mister South",
  COALESCE(runtime_mister_west_h,0) AS "Mister West",
  COALESCE(runtime_mister_center_h,0) AS "Mister Center"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

panels.description: Daily runtime hours per equipment. Stacked bars show total utilization.

panels.title: Gas Therms vs Outdoor Temperature

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, therms_estimated AS "Therms"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND therms_estimated > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, ROUND(AVG(m.outdoor_temp_f)::numeric,1) AS "Outdoor Temp"
FROM daily_summary ds JOIN v_climate_merged m ON m.bucket::date = ds.date
WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND therms_estimated > 0 GROUP BY ds.date ORDER BY ds.date

panels.description: Gas heating demand inversely correlates with outdoor temperature.
Runtime-modeled electric load from published device wattage and observed on-time overlaid with available solar radiation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  bucket AS time,
  round(total_watts::numeric, 0) AS "Runtime Load (W)"
FROM fn_runtime_power_30m($__timeFrom()::timestamptz, LEAST($__timeTo()::timestamptz, now()))
ORDER BY bucket

SELECT time_bucket('30 minutes', ts) AS time, round(avg(solar_irradiance_w_m2)::numeric, 0) AS "Solar (W/m²)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Runtime-Modeled Power vs Solar Irradiance

panels.description: Percent of runtime-modeled electrical load consumed during solar hours across the last 30 completed days.

targets.rawSql:
WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    bucket AS ts,
    total_watts AS watts
  FROM fn_runtime_power_30m(
    (((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date - 30)::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver'),
    ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')
  )
)
SELECT now() AS time,
       round((100.0 * SUM(watts) FILTER (WHERE extract(hour from ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver') BETWEEN 8 AND 17) / NULLIF(SUM(watts), 0))::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM modeled

panels.title: 30-Day Solar-Aligned Runtime Load

panels.description: Percent of average runtime-modeled overnight load covered by one Powerwall (13.5 kWh), using the last 30 completed days.

targets.rawSql:
WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    bucket AS ts,
    total_watts AS watts
  FROM fn_runtime_power_30m(
    (((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date - 30)::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver'),
    ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')
  )
)
SELECT now() AS time,
       round((13.5 / NULLIF(avg(watts)::numeric * 14 / 1000, 0) * 100)::numeric, 0) AS value
FROM modeled
WHERE extract(hour from ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver') NOT BETWEEN 8 AND 17

panels.title: 30-Day Powerwall Coverage

targets.rawSql:
WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    bucket AS ts,
    total_watts AS watts
  FROM fn_runtime_power_30m(
    (((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date - 30)::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver'),
    ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')
  )
)
SELECT now() AS time,
       round(avg(watts)::numeric, 0) AS value
FROM modeled
WHERE extract(hour from ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver') BETWEEN 8 AND 17

WITH modeled AS (
  SELECT
    bucket AS ts,
    total_watts AS watts
  FROM fn_runtime_power_30m(
    (((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date - 30)::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver'),
    ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')::date::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver')
  )
)
SELECT now() AS time,
       round(avg(watts)::numeric, 0) AS value
FROM modeled
WHERE extract(hour from ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver') NOT BETWEEN 8 AND 17
SELECT now() as time, round(avg(kwh_estimated)::numeric, 1) as value FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND kwh_estimated IS NOT NULL
SELECT now() as time, round(max(solar_irradiance_w_m2)::numeric, 0) as value FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  bucket AS time,
  round(heat1_watts::numeric, 0) AS "Runtime Heat 1 (W)",
  round(fans_watts::numeric, 0) AS "Runtime Fans (W)",
  round(other_watts::numeric, 0) AS "Runtime Other (fog/lights/vent)"
FROM fn_runtime_power_30m($__timeFrom()::timestamptz, LEAST($__timeTo()::timestamptz, now()))
ORDER BY bucket

SELECT
  (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time,
  round(cost_electric::numeric, 2) AS "Runtime Electric ($)",
  round(cost_gas::numeric, 2) AS "Gas ($)",
  round(cost_water::numeric, 2) AS "Water ($)"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz)
  AND cost_total > 0
ORDER BY date
